fields.name: messageId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the sanctions list hit message

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp of when the sanctions list hit was detected

fields.name: source
fields.description: System that originated the sanctions list hit message

fields.name: destination
fields.description: System that received the sanctions list hit message

fields.name: sanctionsListHit
fields.description: Details of the sanctions list hit

children.name: hitId
children.description: Unique identifier for the sanctions list hit

children.name: severity
children.description: Severity level of the sanctions list hit

children.name: status
children.description: Status of the sanctions list hit (e.g., PENDING_REVIEW)

children.name: matchedEntity
children.description: Details of the entity matched by the sanctions list hit

children.name: entityId
children.description: Unique identifier for the matched entity

children.name: entityType
children.description: Type of the matched entity (e.g., INDIVIDUAL, ORGANIZATION)

children.name: name
children.description: Name of the matched entity

children.name: dateOfBirth
children.description: Date of birth of the matched individual

children.name: nationality
children.description: Nationality of the matched entity

children.name: identificationDocuments
children.description: List of identification documents matching the entity

children.name: type
children.description: Type of identification document (e.g., PASSPORT, ID_CARD)

children.name: number
children.description: Number of the identification document

children.name: issuingCountry
children.description: Country that issued the identification document

children.name: sanctionListsMatched
children.description: List of sanction lists that matched the entity

children.name: listName
children.description: Name of the sanction list

children.name: listVersion
children.description: Version of the sanction list

children.name: matchScore
children.description: Confidence score of the match

children.name: matchFields
children.description: List of fields that matched the entity

children.name: riskFactors
children.description: List of risk factors associated with the sanctions list hit

children.name: associatedAccounts
children.description: List of accounts associated with the sanctions list hit

children.name: accountNumber
children.description: Unique identifier for the account

children.name: accountType
children.description: Type of the associated account (e.g., SAVINGS, CURRENT)

children.name: currency
children.description: Currency of the associated account

children.name: status
children.description: Status of the associated account (e.g., FROZEN, ACTIVE)

children.name: reviewDetails
children.description: Details of the review process for the sanctions list hit

children.name: assignedTo
children.description: Name of the person assigned to review the sanctions list hit

children.name: reviewDeadline
children.description: Deadline for reviewing the sanctions list hit

children.name: notes
children.description: Notes about the review process

children.name: requiredActions
children.description: List of required actions for reviewing the sanctions list hit

children.name: auditTrail
children.description: Details of the audit trail for the sanctions list hit

children.name: detectionTimestamp
children.description: Timestamp when the sanctions list hit was detected

children.name: detectionMethod
children.description: Method used to detect the sanctions list hit

children.name: screeningMethod
children.description: Method used to screen the sanctions list hit
